programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil talks to controlling guests and the loved ones who feel trapped by them. Jeffrey hates that his wife of seven months, Mindy, goes out clubbing with her younger friends, who he says are a bad influence on her. Mindy leaves the kids with Jeffrey's 16-year-old daughter and parties until 6:00 a.m., while he works the night shift. Mindy calls Jeffrey “a warden,” and says if he had his way, she’d never leave the house. Then, Jason claims his wife, Terrie, is lazy. He says he has to clean the house, do chores, take care of the kids and balance two checkbooks! Terrie says her large chest and arthritis prevent her from doing household tasks. Can Jason get his wife to clean up her act?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: How has the role of the man evolved in the modern family? One woman claims her husband provides her with everything—except love and affection. He says he only knows how to provide financially. Can Dr. Phil help them find a balance and save their marriage of 17 years? Then, one guest entered into a new relationship after leaving his wife and kids. Now, his guilt is causing him to lie, manipulate and become physically abusive. Find out what Dr. Phil has to say to these men about the true measure of a man’s success in a relationship!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Millions were inspired by the first “Role of the Man” show. Now, Dr. Phil is making it an ongoing series and checking in with past guests. Remember the husband who provided everything for his wife…except intimacy? He’s back! Are they now sleeping in the same bed? Then, you’ll hear from the man who wanted his wife to have sex with him on demand. Did he change his selfish ways or is he still in the doghouse? Plus, what’s a mama’s boy to do when his wife insists he cut the umbilical cord once and for all?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Attention men: If you have a child on the way, or dream of being a father some day, you don’t want to miss this show! A little-known law could keep you from having any rights to your child. Bryce and Esther dated for one month before Esther became pregnant. Bryce says he wanted to marry Esther and raise their child together, but Esther says she wasn’t ready to be a mother. When they broke up, Esther decided to place the baby for adoption without informing Bryce. When Bryce finally learned his daughter was born, she was already seven days old and placed with another family. Now Bryce is fighting to get his child back, but because of an obscure law in some states, he has lost his rights as a father. What law did Bryce fail to comply with that even the lawyers in this case weren’t previously aware of? Is he unfit as a father, or is this law unconstitutional? Bryce and Esther’s lawyers give their opinion. Plus, the grandparents at odds over Esther’s decision face off. Don’t miss this heated discussion and learn more about the Putative Fathers Registry!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Christina, 21, and her younger sister, Carlie, 13, say they had a close relationship with their father, Michael, until two years ago when he decided to transition to a female. Michael was a police officer, soldier and loving parent who lived his life as a male for 40 years. Now, he wants his daughters to call him Mom, because he says Dad is gone, but they refuse. Michael, who prefers to be called Kayla, says she wants to explain to her daughters why she's living as a woman, but they've never given her the chance. The last time Christina saw her father was two years ago when he showed up at her work in lace and blue jeans to break the news that he's transgendered. When she sees Kayla onstage, does she greet her with open arms? Next, Carlie joins her sister and father. She says she wants her old dad back, but will she feel the same after seeing Kayla? Can the father-daughter bond be turned into a mother-daughter one? Be prepared for an emotional journey as two daughters struggle to understand how someone they loved so much could hurt them so badly.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A 13-year-old's powerful and disturbing diary entries have Dr. Phil very concerned. Trisha says her daughter's pain stems from her father's discipline. How do you know if your discipline crosses the line into abuse?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil delves into a tragic story that spanned several decades, shattered lives and left one person behind bars. Fourteen children were held captive by a man who called himself The Messiah … a man who was also their father. Jeanne says she was raised in this environment, which the authorities called cult-like, and that she and her siblings were starved, beaten and had no schooling. In a tear-jerking revelation, Jeanne tells Dr. Phil that she was forced to perform unthinkable sexual acts with her own father, beginning when she was just 5 years old and ending when she was 27. Jeanne may be a victim of horrible cruelty, but her sisters, Miriam and Sarah, say they can’t forgive her for the pain she caused them. Find out why these siblings are estranged, and why Sarah says she’s nervous just sitting next to Jeanne on Dr. Phil’s stage. It’s been 20 years since Jeanne’s father was arrested, but she and her family say the effects of abuse still linger. Can these siblings ever get closure on their horrific past?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil tackles two news stories that have captivated millions. First up, is it ever appropriate to confront your child’s bullies? That’s what James Jones says he did when he boarded his 12-year-old daughter, Chatari’s, school bus, and the video of his tirade went viral! James says some of the students terrorized his child, who suffers from cerebral palsy, and his actions resulted in two second-degree misdemeanor charges against him. CNN contributor Roland Martin joins the show, and he says James should be named Father of the Year for protecting Chatari, who was reportedly hit, called names and had condoms thrown at her. Roland goes head-to-head with attorney Areva Martin, who says James’s behavior was unwarranted. Did this dad cross the line? What does Dr. Phil think? Plus, the disappearance of David Hartley reads like a murder mystery. His wife, Tiffany, says they were on vacation when David was shot in the head by Mexican pirates while jet skiing. His body was never recovered, and Mexican authorities question if the event really occurred. Some people wonder if Tiffany was involved, but she maintains her innocence. Find out why she declined a lie detector test, and hear Dr. Phil’s strong message for her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From spending $600,000 on 3-year-old beauty queens, to pushy stage sisters and an ambitious boxing coach — today's guests say they go to the extremes to help the youngest members of their family excel. Meet two fathers, one whose full-time job is managing his tiny stars' careers, and the other who hand makes each and every one of his 4-year-old daughter's costumes. Are these dads bonding with their daughters or simply pushing too hard? Plus, meet several women who defiantly criticize child beauty pageants. And, hear from one overzealous sister and the father of a boxing champion once ranked first in the world. Can Dr. Phil convince these guests to step aside and strive for balance in their children's lives?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Sisters Rylie, 23, and Lenae, 26, claim their father, Leonard, was extremely physically and verbally abusive during their childhood and that they lived in constant fear of him — allegations he absolutely denies. They also claim their mother, Susan, did not protect them from him. Rylie claims the alleged abuse was so damaging that she believes it’s the cause of her diagnosis of Borderline Personality Disorder. Lenae says the many years of alleged verbal abuse have led to self-loathing and even an eating disorder. Leonard admits to having a tough disciplinary style, but refutes his daughters accusations — even saying they’ve blown everything out of proportion.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Can married people be friends with someone of the opposite sex without sex getting in the way? At what point does a friendly relationship become an affair of the heart or emotional infidelity? Meet Randy, who says his wife, Amanda, has crossed that line.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Can Dr. Phil convince a 24 yo NYU grad that he’s not a cyborg from the future?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Cherylyn says she loves living the high life and admits she is a spoiled and entitled“princess”who has spent tens of thousands of other people’s money on her lavish lifestyle. Cherylyn says she maxed out her 19 credit cards on designer shoes, handbags, purses, clothes, makeup and pampering! And, Cherylyn says she insists on fine dining, fast cars and her boyfriend, Tyler, footing the bill. However, Tyler says he has nothing more to give Cherylyn except an ultimatum, which he delivers when he comes face-to-face with her onstage. Cherylyn's mom, Joey, says that her selfish and manipulative daughter has blown over $130,000 in less than a year and her spending has left a trail of devastation which includes pawning over $7,000 worth of family heirlooms and stealing her identity. Sparks fly when Cherylyn defends her entitled behavior during the taping. What jaw-dropping statement does an unrepentant Cherylyn make to Dr. Phil?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meddling moms who track and monitor their children's lives.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents: If your teen talks back, acts out or is just plain rude, you better tune in!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With the economy in trouble, a lot of people are under pressure and getting desperate. Learn the tools to protect yourself from liars, cheats and scammers who are trying to take advantage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a Dr. Phil exclusive, a 17-year-old football star accused of rape -- and the alleged victim -- speak out about how one alcohol-fueled night changed their lives in an instant. Matt says he and three friends were drinking at a party nearly nine months ago when the four boys had sex with a 16-year-old classmate. He claims she initiated the encounter and that the sex was consensual. Matt and the three boys are charged with second-degree rape, and Matt says his dreams of getting a college scholarship have been put on hold. How does he describe the events of that night? And, what, if anything, does he say he’d do differently? Then, hear from the alleged victim, who is speaking out for the first time. What does she recall happening that night? And, how has the ordeal impacted her life? Plus, Matt’s parents, Dianne and Mark, insist their son is innocent and say they believe the alleged victim is out for attention. Dr. Phil has a powerful message for the couple.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil delves into the dangers of teenage sex and underage drinking -- and how three families have been affected. In Part 2 of his exclusive interview, the 16-year-old girl who claims high school football star Matt and three other classmates raped her at a party opens up about what she says happened that night. Why does she say her peers care more about the accused football players than they do her? Don’t miss Matt and his parents’ reactions to what she has to say. Then, Leah alleges that in 2011, her 15-year-old daughter, Rehtaeh, was raped by four classmates at a party, and that after nearly a year-and-a-half of relentless bullying, the teen took her own life. How could this have been prevented? And what message does Leah have for others in similar situations? Plus, hear from Alexis, who says she too was raped at 15 and “could’ve been Rehtaeh.” What does she say got her through her darkest moments? Don’t miss this powerful cautionary tale for every teen and parent! This program contains strong sexual content.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: t’s been almost four months since 5-year-old Summer Wells vanished from her home in rural Tennessee on June 15, 2021. Her parents, Don and Candus, say they believe their daughter was abducted. But, the couple say online bullies have accused them of having something to do with Summer’s disappearance. Don and Candus agreed to sit down with body language experts Scott Rouse and Greg Hartley, interrogators who have worked with the FBI, law enforcement and the military and have been referred to as a human lie detector, in hopes of clearing their name. Find out what the men think and if Dr. Phil agrees with their findings.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Since the night of June 15, 2021, there have been no answers as to where Candus and Don’s 5-year-old daughter Summer could be. The parents say they thought they were doing the right thing by requesting the public's help to find their little girl, but it backfired. Instead, the couple say they became targets of online bullies who accused them of involvement in the disappearance of their missing child. In part 2, Don and Candus speak out in their exclusive first national TV interview. Dr. Phil digs deeper into the story to discover whether there is any new information that might help solve the mystery of Summer’s disappearance.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Revisiting the 1992 murder of Shanda Sharer, her family reflects on coping and forgiveness.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The family of Shanda Sharer who was murdered confronts one of the convicted killers.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is there something you’ve been hanging on to for just a little too long? Clothes you haven’t fit into since high school? Boxes of stuff you haven’t looked at in years? Dr. Phil’s guests say their loved ones need to call the junk yard and “Get rid of it!” Kim says her husband, Paul’s, Star Warshobby has to go. With over 6,000 pieces in his collection, Paul spends 30 hours a week playing with his action figures, building models and talking to friends about Star Wars. He even had a light saber sword fight at their wedding, so shouldn’t Kim have known what she was getting into? Next, Larry and Sheila married four months ago, but Sheila says she had no idea she was getting hitched to a hoarder. Larry says she’s got it all wrong -– she’s the pack rat! With some of their favorite collections rolled out on stage, can Dr. Phil help them negotiate what goes and what stays? Plus, meet Terri, who has four storage units and two garages full of sentimental memories -– like a rubber chicken and her father’s spine X-rays! She spends so much money storing her stuff, that she can’t even afford health insurance. What’s at the heart of her hoarding? Don’t miss this hilarious look at how collections can get out of control!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman accused her ex-husband of molesting her daughter.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brenda says she fell in love with and married her husband, Don – despite their 26-year age gap. But soon after, she claims her “Prince Charming” turned “crazy” and “temperamental.” Is their age difference at the root of their issues? Then, Bev says she’s concerned for her sister, Melanie, who married her much younger man, Devar, after meeting him on a Jamaican vacation. Is Devar in it for love, or for a green card and money? And, Dr. Phil catches up with best-selling author Mitch Albom.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When Pierre, his wife, Amanda, and his mother, Yolande, came to see Dr. Phil, the couple complained his mom was a meddling-mother-in-law. Amanda said Yolande never approved of her, and Yolande admitted she wanted her son to be with a more educated woman. Is this family still at odds?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: You’ve heard it all before: “Just do it my way.” “If I want it done right, I’ll have to do it myself.” Dr. Phil looks at control freaks, and how their behavior can destroy a marriage. Jim thinks his wife, Sinden, is the most controlling woman in America. They’ve recently separated because, he says, she picked out his clothes, told him what he could watch on TV and micromanaged his finances down to how much he could spend on a candy bar. But Sinden says there’s a darker side of Jim, a police officer of 20 years. She calls him a master manipulator who rules by intimidation. Find out why she says she fears for her life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Michele says her husband, Carl, is embarrassed by her and looks disgusted whenever he sees her naked. Carl admits that if Michele looked this way when they met, he wouldn't have been attracted to her. Can he look past the physical and reconnect with the woman he married? Then, Teri is a newlywed who asks her husband 20 times a day if she's hot enough. Why does Dr. Phil tell her she's playing with fire? And, Kenny wants his wife, Anita, to look hot, sexy and irresistible again, like she did when they got married seven years ago. Anita says Kenny tears her heart out when he tells her she will be beautiful when she loses weight. What's at the root of their problem?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Karen writes: Dear Dr. Phil, My husband mentally abuses me. I've never, in my life, had a guy tell me how fat I am, how terrible I look, or criticize how I put my makeup on. He constantly calls me names and makes fat jokes. Sometimes I have to hide in the bathroom when I eat something just so we won't fight about it. Any time I try to get close to him, he literally pushes me away and says, "Don't even touch me until you're under 200 pounds".

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Wives who say their husbands try to control every aspect of their lives.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What’s a woman to do when her spouse is constantly standing over her shoulder and nitpicking everything she does? Michelle says her husband, Jim, has controlled her for the 15 years that they’ve been together, and she’s fed up with his faultfinding. She says he tells her what to wear, how much she should eat, and even uses a GPS to track her whereabouts! Jim admits that his behavior is out of control and fears that he could be pushing his wife out the door. Why is he so critical of Michelle, and can Dr. Phil get the judgmental hubby to change his ways? Then, Sally says her husband, John, is so controlling that she spends most of her days picking up dust bunnies from the floor and only speaking when he allows her to. John says cleanliness is next to godliness and believes control is a matter of perception. See what causes him to go toe to toe with Dr. Phil! Will the couple get the help they’re seeking? It’s an explosive Dr. Phil you don’t want to miss!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: How much should looking good factor into your relationship? Today’s guests say appearance matters, and their mate is not up to their standards! Sandi says after six years of marriage, she misses her husband, Otto’s, six-pack. He says working -- not working out -- is a priority for him, and nothing will satisfy his wife, who rates herself a 20 out of 10. But the couple does agree on one thing: whatever Sandi wants, Sandi gets. Will Otto agree to hit the gym? Then, Dawn worked hard to shed 150 pounds, and when the new svelte Dawn met Paul, sparks flew! He thought she was hot -- until she undressed. What is she hiding? Plus, discover why Dr. Phil wrestles with his decision to help Dawn and Paul. And, Cynthia says she’s embarrassed by her boyfriend’s outdated wardrobe, and refuses to be seen with him in public! Can a professional makeover change her opinion?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mary’s 30-year-old daughter, Lynn, claims to be suffering from numerous medical conditions, including stomach cancer, heart disease, uterine cancer, rheumatoid arthritis and other ailments -- but Mary believes it’s all lies, concocted to gain money and attention. Mary says she has found no evidence of her daughter’s health conditions and was horrified to learn that Lynn had created a crowdfunding website, asking for donations for medical expenses. Lynn insists she’s gravely ill and says it sickens her even more that her mother doesn’t believe her. The mother and daughter face each other for the first time in a year on Dr. Phil’s stage. Dr. Phil reviews Lynn’s medical records -- how does she explain the inconsistencies? And, how can Lynn find a return to health and start living again?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A mother who is afraid of her 17-year-old son seeks help.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From marital spats to parenting disagreements, learn the biggest mistakes you're making.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Beka is a mom of three teenage girls who she says are angry, violent and out of control. She says an argument with her oldest daughter Arielle escalated to a life-threatening altercation when the 16-year-old stabbed her with a kitchen knife. Arielle was arrested and sent to juvenile detention for the incident, but is she remorseful? And are her 15-year-old identical twin sisters following in her footsteps? Beka says they are "evil" and have threatened to kill her too. But the twins tell a different story, claiming Beka is the one who is manipulative and abusive. They say she drinks excessively, has choked them and has even tried to take her own life. Can Dr. Phil get to the root of the real problem in this tumultuous household? Beka's husband, Jody, weighs in. Plus, Dr. Phil delivers a shocking message to this family in crisis -- Don't miss it.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is there an adult under your roof, eating your food and taking advantage of you financially? If yes, then you live with a moocher! It's time to stop the enabling and start the accountability.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meet a “runaway bride” who’s already called off five weddings and she’s only 26! Then, meet another guest who’s frustrated because her fiancé won’t set a wedding date. He's canceled two previous engagements and says marriage "freaks him out." What does the future hold for these two? Plus, a heartbroken woman whose fiancé called the wedding off a month before her big day. Should she wait for him to come around? Find out what every bride needs to know before walking down the aisle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Can married people be friends with someone of the opposite sex without sex getting in the way? At what point does a friendly relationship become an affair of the heart or emotional infidelity? Meet Randy, who says his wife, Amanda, has crossed that line.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: One man says he caught his wife cheating – on audiotape – but she denies the accusations. Who’s really telling the truth? Dr. Phil gets to the bottom of the alleged affair on tape. Can this relationship survive without trust?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: An engagement symbolizes a commitment you make to one special person. But Dr. Phil's guests are accused of the ultimate betrayal: cheating on their spouse-to-be right before walking down the aisle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melinda and Amy claim their lives have been turned upside down by a social media influencer and political activist named Paloma, who they say has subjected them to nine months of cyberbullying and harassment. Paloma says they’ve got it all wrong and that she is the victim of their cyberbullying. Who is the real victim? Will Dr. Phil convince these three women to “log off” from each other? Find out in this explosive episode!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Baronica and Nathan say that on July 10, 2021, their then 9-year-old son shot his 8-year-old brother in the chest with one of six unsecured guns in their home. The parents bravely come forward to tell their story in hopes that other parents will learn from their mistakes. Then, Kristin says the last time she saw her 15-year-old son, Ethan, he was heading to his best friend’s house. Within hours, she was informed Ethan had been killed by an unsecured gun in his best friend’s house. Kristin has fought to have Ethan’s Law enacted in CT, which ensures that parents are held accountable for the safe storage of their weapons. And, hear from Susan, whose daughter Amanda was sitting on a park bench when she was shot by a group of young people, leaving her paralyzed. Plus, Ryan Busse, a former gun industry executive who says he left the industry after seeing how fear tactics were being used to sell guns, joins the conversation. This is a show every parent needs to watch -- whether you own a firearm or not.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Is there an adult under your roof, eating your food and taking advantage of you financially? If yes, then you live with a moocher! It's time to stop the enabling and start the accountability.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Are deadbeat dads actually dead broke dads? As the American economy struggles, men comprise most of the recent layoffs. In child support cases, are men and women treated equally in the courts, or are the laws out of touch with today's crisis? Dr. Phil's guests, along with Mel Feit, director of the National Center for Men, and Lis Wiehl, author and legal analyst, debate the issue that has many men feeling like the laws are against them.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman believes her sister lied about being diagnosed with more than 70 health conditions.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The conversation continues with a woman who says her sister lied about health diagnoses for attention.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Can Dr. Phil convince a 24 yo NYU grad that he’s not a cyborg from the future?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman accuses a former friend of fake pregnancies.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Did a woman accused of fake pregnancies really lie?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you know someone who likes to pass the buck, point fingers and play the blame game, instead of taking responsibility and apologizing? Dr. Phil's guests are ready to confront a loved one who refuses to say they're sorry.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you have a relative scheming to get money from a rich aunt, uncle or even parents when they pass away?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Meleah and Greg's young love story started and ended like so many. But when Meleah discovered she was pregnant following their breakup, their lives became forever intertwined. Watch as sparks fly when they face off! Plus, Paige was a teen mom struggling to make ends meet. You won't want to miss her remarkable update!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Living with an alcoholic parent is one of the most difficult and heart-wrenching experiences a child can go through. Heather, 28, and Alexandra, 21, say their mother, Joey, is a pathetic drunk, and if she doesn't get clean once and for all, they will walk away from her forever.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: We've all heard of in-laws who don't get along, but these guests say their problems have become scary and even life-threatening.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angelique recounts escaping a life-threatening scheme while pregnant.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: One man says he caught his wife cheating – on audiotape – but she denies the accusations. Who’s really telling the truth? Dr. Phil gets to the bottom of the alleged affair on tape. Can this relationship survive without trust?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Horrific allegations are tearing a family apart — but who is telling the truth? Todd says he was shocked and appalled when his ex-girlfriend's mother, Diana, accused him of molesting his 4-year-old daughter, Taniya, and turns to Dr. Phil to help clear his name. Diana says that while babysitting Taniya, the toddler detailed ways in which Todd inappropriately touched her, and she's convinced he's done the unthinkable. After learning of the accusations, Taniya's mom, Latia, reported the alleged sexual abuse to a judge who immediately stripped Todd of his parental rights — but was justice served? Latia says that as much as she wants to believe Todd's innocence, as a mother, she needs to take every precaution to protect her child. A year has passed since he's seen his daughter, and Todd says he will go to any length to prove his innocence, including taking another a lie detector test — even though he's already passed one. He's adamant that Diana is lying and says that she coached Taniya to make the accusations. Dr. Phil calls in an expert polygraph examiner. Don't miss the shocking results!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The new series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story may have landed the number one spot on Netflix, but it wasn’t popular with everyone. Angry family members of Dahmer’s victims say the controversial drama re-traumatized them and romanticized the notorious serial killer. You’ve seen Hollywood’s version. Today, Dr. Phil is telling the real story and meeting the real people who say they knew the real monster that was Jeffrey Dahmer. In an exclusive interview, hear from the sister of one victim who says the series glorified the man she calls “Satan,” as well as two men who say they were tortured and terrorized by Dahmer and survived.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

A man denies vandalizing a building even though there's evidence on his fingers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Suspects lead Officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: ¡Echa un vistazo a las recopilaciones de Angry Birds Toons! Cada recopilación contiene varios episodios de tus series favoritas, como Angry Birds, Piggy Tales y Stella.

programme.title: Alex y el Mar
programme.desc: Alex vive en una isla y se prepara cada mañana un desayuno mientras Rocco y Lili juegan juntos. Un científico holográfico aparece en una máquina y le dice a Alex cual es su misión para el día: Alex ha de fotografiar un delfín. Descubrirá todo tipo de vida submarina. Después de un rato, Alex ve un delfín y toma una foto de él. Luego, regresa de vuelta a casa. Al final, una voz explica las características de los delfines.

programme.title: Pintxo Contra el Cambio Climatico
programme.desc: Pintxo es un duende travieso, junto a él nos divertiremos y jugaremos en casa mientras respetamos nuestro planeta y hacemos frente al cambio climático. Descubre cómo las pequeñas acciones en casa; como ahorrar agua y apagar luces pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: BarryTiger
programme.desc: BarryTiger es una serie animada en 3D vibrante y cautivadora, diseñada para niños de 1 a 8 años, que da vida a aventuras cotidianas a través de música pegajosa y encantadora. Con una variedad de personajes coloridos y temas ricos y diversos, la serie muestra los momentos alegres de la vida de la familia BarryTiger. La producción musical de alta calidad, con melodías excepcionales, arreglos sobresalientes y actuaciones destacadas, añade una capa extra de diversión a las escenas animadas y dinámicas. ¡Prepárate para cantar, bailar y explorar junto a Barry y sus amigos en cada emocionante episodio!

programme.title: Domi Kids
programme.desc: "Domi Kids es una serie musical animada en 3D que da vida a las alegres y cálidas aventuras diarias de la familia Domi, compuesta por cinco integrantes. Con música animada y divertida, y actuaciones de múltiples personajes, el programa ofrece una gran variedad de temas, historias atractivas y escenas diversas. Un equipo profesional de producción musical asegura melodías de primera calidad, arreglos excepcionales y actuaciones vocales destacadas, brindando un festín audiovisual encantador para los niños. El contenido es positivo, entretenido y está diseñado para ayudar a los niños a aprender y explorar el mundo de una manera apropiada para su edad. Además, apoya a los padres en su camino hacia una crianza fácil y placentera, mientras acompaña a los niños en su crecimiento y desarrollo."

programme.title: Peztronauta
programme.desc: Fishtronaut, un pez con traje de agua, viaja por tierra para resolver misterios y ayuda a los espectadores a aprender cómo proteger el medio ambiente.

programme.title: MINITUNS
programme.desc: MINITUNS presenta una selección emocionante y divertida de canciones infantiles, perfectas para disfrutar, bailar y cantar en familia. Un mundo lleno de colores y melodías, diseñado para enseñar a contar, cuidar el planeta y disfrutar del juego.

programme.title: Leo Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger presenta los secretos y las maravillas de la naturaleza y la vida silvestre que nos rodea y estimula la curiosidad y la pasión por la naturaleza en los niños. Con interesantes misiones y aventuras, los niños se divierten mientras aprenden lecciones positivas.

programme.desc: ¡Ayuda a Fluffy a resolver los problemas de sus amigos con rimas divertidas y pegadizas!

programme.title: Iron Kid
programme.desc: Gaff, Guardián de la Familia Eon y protector del Puño, está huyendo de la asesina a sueldo Belleza Negra y su equipo de Ninjas Robots. Escapa por poco de su ataque y arroja una caja de madera en una cueva de la Zona Prohibida, un área controlada por el Duque von Rhymer, presidente de la Torre de Hierro. La caja contiene el Puño de Eón.

programme.title: Planeta de Niños
programme.desc: Divertida y cautivadora serie educativa y de entretenimiento para niños, que refuerza virtudes fundamentales y modales enseñados a los niños por sus padres y maestros, en la escuela y en casa. Desde la confianza, humildad y el perdón, a la honestidad, responsabilidad, cooperación y dignidad. El show ayuda a los niños a comprender la importancia desde pequeños detalles como ser corteses, hasta a desarrollar grandes virtudes y habilidades, como saber toma de decisiones.

programme.title: Talking Tom Heroes
programme.desc: ¡Los Talking Tom Heroes al rescate! Gracias a algunas mejoras extraordinarias, cristales de poder y nuevos artilugios geniales, tus personajes favoritos de Talking Tom and Friends se han transformado. Ahora, superamigos y héroes asombrosos, ¡están aquí pa

programme.title: Leo Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger presenta los secretos y las maravillas de la naturaleza y la vida silvestre que nos rodea y estimula la curiosidad y la pasión por la naturaleza en los niños. Con interesantes misiones y aventuras, los niños se divierten mientras aprenden lecciones positivas.

programme.title: Papelitos
programme.desc: La serie animada “papelitos” cuenta de una manera divertida a los más pequeñitos sobre las simpáticas aventuras de unos animales de papel: Un alce llamado Aristóteles y un pájaro carpintero llamado Tuc-Tuc en el país de papel donde todo por completo está hecho de papel. Divertidas aventuras se acompañan con interesantes clases de manualidades donde los espectadores aprenderán como con papel y cartón crear a todos los personajes de la serie utilizando tijeras y pegamento. El proyecto tiene apoyo de la página web donde están presentados todos los moldes y consejos para crear el mundo de papel. De esta manera el espectador participa en el juego que supone la creación y el desarrollo de muchas habilidades prácticas que distraen a los chicos del encierro permanente de la computadora. El proyecto “Papelitos” es una divertida y didáctica alternativa en lugar de pasar tiempo con la computadora. Toda la acción en el dibujo animado es narrada por una voz en off y repleta de ingeniosos chistes. Cada capítulo dura 5 minutos (la versión sin clase – 4 minutos). La técnica de animación – gráficos 3D que imitan al papel.

programme.title: BFF
programme.desc: Las BFF son un grupo de amigas adolescentes que descubren que juntas pueden superar cualquier situación por complicada que sea y convertirse en… ¡mejores amigas para siempre! Sus aventuras están llenas de momentos musicales y situaciones desternillantes interrumpidas constantemente por Shadow, un personaje mágico y travieso que intenta difundir desesperadamente negatividad y “malas vibraciones”. Sin embargo, ¡sus intentos se verán frustrados por las BFF y sus collares de la amistad!

programme.title: Leoncito Alado
programme.desc: LEONCITO ALADO es un canal de canciones infantiles para niños de 1 a 3 años de edad. Aquí podrás encontrar canciones para tranquilizar, entretener y enseñar valores y talentos a nuestros pequeños espectadores.

programme.title: Pim y Pom en el Museo
programme.desc: Pim y Pom, dos gatitos, llevan a los niños a una aventura en el fascinante mundo del arte. Con la fuerza de su imaginación, exploran cuadros de artistas famosos como Vincent van Gogh, Johannes Vermeer, Rembrandt, Seurat y Renoir.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: La Srta. Vanthrax tiene un resfriado y le pide a Talking Ben que sea el maestro sustituto para su clase. Ben esta encantado, especialmente porque los estudiantes van a decidir hoy el proyecto para la feria de ciencias!

programme.title: Pintxo Contra el Cambio Climatico
programme.desc: Pintxo es un duende travieso, junto a él nos divertiremos y jugaremos en casa mientras respetamos nuestro planeta y hacemos frente al cambio climático. Descubre cómo las pequeñas acciones en casa; como ahorrar agua y apagar luces pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Glumpers
programme.desc: Si la simple convivencia entre dos personas puede hacer que salten chispas, imagínense lo que podría suceder en una casa habitada por seres con 6 personalidades completamente opuestas. Los Glumpers son una pandilla, un grupo de amigos que viven juntos, las acusadas personalidades de los cuales interactúan continuamente. Si entre los seres humanos una simple discusión en general, va a terminar con sólo un par de insultos, en el caso de los Glumpers puede terminar, en el mejor de los casos, en una explosión atómica.

programme.title: Alex y el Huerto
programme.desc: Cada mañana, la abuela le da una semilla mágica a Alex y él se apresura a la huerta para plantarla. Entonces, va a la fuente a por agua, por lo que puede regar las semillas mágicas. Alex espera con impaciencia para ver como la fruta o vegetal va a crecer. Luego, con destellos de magia, surge de una planta del suelo, y ahí está ... ... un naranjo! Va con una cesta y coge la fruta que van a comer para el almuerzo. Abuela y Alex se sientan a la mesa y comen la fruta o beben su jugo. En Al final, podemos ver y escuchar la explicación de las propiedades básicas de la fruta que acaban de comer.

programme.title: Boom and Reds
programme.desc: Boom & Reds, una serie preescolar. Trata sobre Boom, un cálido y amigable ogro violeta, el cual en cada episodio, intentara averiguar que estan dibujando en el suelo, los reds, una pequeña banda de criaturas de cabezas de champiñones. Desgraciadamente, el echo de que Boom no sea muy inteligente no le ayudará, haciendole pensar en locas sugerencias.

programme.title: Domi Kids
programme.desc: "Domi Kids es una serie musical animada en 3D que da vida a las alegres y cálidas aventuras diarias de la familia Domi, compuesta por cinco integrantes. Con música animada y divertida, y actuaciones de múltiples personajes, el programa ofrece una gran variedad de temas, historias atractivas y escenas diversas. Un equipo profesional de producción musical asegura melodías de primera calidad, arreglos excepcionales y actuaciones vocales destacadas, brindando un festín audiovisual encantador para los niños. El contenido es positivo, entretenido y está diseñado para ayudar a los niños a aprender y explorar el mundo de una manera apropiada para su edad. Además, apoya a los padres en su camino hacia una crianza fácil y placentera, mientras acompaña a los niños en su crecimiento y desarrollo."

programme.title: BarryTiger
programme.desc: BarryTiger es una serie animada en 3D vibrante y cautivadora, diseñada para niños de 1 a 8 años, que da vida a aventuras cotidianas a través de música pegajosa y encantadora. Con una variedad de personajes coloridos y temas ricos y diversos, la serie muestra los momentos alegres de la vida de la familia BarryTiger. La producción musical de alta calidad, con melodías excepcionales, arreglos sobresalientes y actuaciones destacadas, añade una capa extra de diversión a las escenas animadas y dinámicas. ¡Prepárate para cantar, bailar y explorar junto a Barry y sus amigos en cada emocionante episodio!

programme.title: Peztronauta
programme.desc: Fishtronaut, un pez con traje de agua, viaja por tierra para resolver misterios y ayuda a los espectadores a aprender cómo proteger el medio ambiente.

programme.title: MINITUNS
programme.desc: MINITUNS presenta una selección emocionante y divertida de canciones infantiles, perfectas para disfrutar, bailar y cantar en familia. Un mundo lleno de colores y melodías, diseñado para enseñar a contar, cuidar el planeta y disfrutar del juego.

programme.title: Leo Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger presenta los secretos y las maravillas de la naturaleza y la vida silvestre que nos rodea y estimula la curiosidad y la pasión por la naturaleza en los niños. Con interesantes misiones y aventuras, los niños se divierten mientras aprenden lecciones positivas.

programme.title: A cantar con Fluffy la Conejita
programme.desc: ¡Ayuda a Fluffy a resolver los problemas de sus amigos con rimas divertidas y pegadizas!

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: ¡Sigue a Bernard mientras hace un desastre!

programme.title: BFF
programme.desc: Las BFF son un grupo de amigas adolescentes que descubren que juntas pueden superar cualquier situación por complicada que sea y convertirse en… ¡mejores amigas para siempre! Sus aventuras están llenas de momentos musicales y situaciones desternillantes interrumpidas constantemente por Shadow, un personaje mágico y travieso que intenta difundir desesperadamente negatividad y “malas vibraciones”. Sin embargo, ¡sus intentos se verán frustrados por las BFF y sus collares de la amistad!

programme.title: Papelitos
programme.desc: La serie animada “papelitos” cuenta de una manera divertida a los más pequeñitos sobre las simpáticas aventuras de unos animales de papel: Un alce llamado Aristóteles y un pájaro carpintero llamado Tuc-Tuc en el país de papel donde todo por completo está hecho de papel. Divertidas aventuras se acompañan con interesantes clases de manualidades donde los espectadores aprenderán como con papel y cartón crear a todos los personajes de la serie utilizando tijeras y pegamento. El proyecto tiene apoyo de la página web donde están presentados todos los moldes y consejos para crear el mundo de papel. De esta manera el espectador participa en el juego que supone la creación y el desarrollo de muchas habilidades prácticas que distraen a los chicos del encierro permanente de la computadora. El proyecto “Papelitos” es una divertida y didáctica alternativa en lugar de pasar tiempo con la computadora. Toda la acción en el dibujo animado es narrada por una voz en off y repleta de ingeniosos chistes. Cada capítulo dura 5 minutos (la versión sin clase – 4 minutos). La técnica de animación – gráficos 3D que imitan al papel.

programme.title: El Mundo de Luna
programme.desc: Curiosa por todo y entusiasmada por la ciencia, Luna, de 6 años, y su hermano Júpiter y su mascota Clyde exploran la naturaleza para conocer el mundo.

programme.title: Planeta de Niños
programme.desc: Divertida y cautivadora serie educativa y de entretenimiento para niños, que refuerza virtudes fundamentales y modales enseñados a los niños por sus padres y maestros, en la escuela y en casa. Desde la confianza, humildad y el perdón, a la honestidad, responsabilidad, cooperación y dignidad. El show ayuda a los niños a comprender la importancia desde pequeños detalles como ser corteses, hasta a desarrollar grandes virtudes y habilidades, como saber toma de decisiones.

programme.title: Leoncito Alado
programme.desc: LEONCITO ALADO es un canal de canciones infantiles para niños de 1 a 3 años de edad. Aquí podrás encontrar canciones para tranquilizar, entretener y enseñar valores y talentos a nuestros pequeños espectadores.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Four more will punch their tickets into the next round as GLORY & RISE search for the baddest featherweight on the planet in this year long tournament. On the GLORY side, top ranked German Polish fighter Denis Wosik (40-9-1, 9 KO) takes on Thai veteran Suarek (107-40-11, 39 KO) and Italy’s Achraf Aasila (53-13, 13 KO) meets France’s Lounis Saing (19-4-1, 12 KO). Meanwhile on the RISE side of the bracket, Japan’s Yutaro Asahi (17-9, 4 KO) clashes with Spain’s Eduardo Catalin (17-3-1) and top Japanese prospect Yura Kono (15-1, 7 KO) goes up against China’s Dexiang Kong (35-10). In addition to the Last Featherweight Standing matchups, Shiro Matsumoto (53-17-4, 18 KO) defends his RISE bantamweight title against top challenger Masahi Kumura (24-7, 12 KO) and Australian KO artists Chadd Collins (64-18-2, 32) defends his RISE super lightweight championship against the great Kento Haraguchi (25-4-1, 14 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 103: Last Heavyweight Standing main event features Levi Rigters (19-3, 9 KO) colliding with Jamal Ben Saddik (38-10, 29 KO) to see who moves on in the tournament. Among the other names taking part in Phase Two are Nabil Khachab (29-6-1, 4 KO), Iancu Ionut (31-11, 13 KO), Rade Opacic (21-7, 16 KO), Milos Cvjeticanin (13-4, 9 KO), Sofian Laidouni (39-5-1, 20 KO), and many more. In addition, Chico Kwasi (44-5-2, 23 KO) will defend his GLORY welterweight world title against Mehdi Ait El Hadj (35-4-2, 8 KO), Mory Kromah (34-3-1, 20 KO) returns and takes on Cristian Ristea (44-26, 13 KO) in a heavyweight match-up outside the tournament, and Tayfun Ozcan (88-11-3, 28 KO) clashes with rival Don Sno (6-2, 3 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: What began with twenty-four of the world’s top featherweights is now down to the final four as they battle in a one-night tournament to crown the Last Featherweight Standing.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katie says her boyfriend, Brandon, is addicted to porn and has caught him sending dirty letters to other women including her mother! Then, 6 months into dating Crosby, Dayana cheated on him and now, he wants to know if their child is his!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Katrina is fed up with her boyfriend Ismael's abusive and controlling ways. Katrina says Ismael acts this way because he believes she has been cheating. Then, Christie has been married to Chris for 8 months and he already suspects her infidelity.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Destiny says that her daughter has unexplained bruises after visiting Brian. She also says the child told her someone grabbed her neck and threw her against a wall. Brian denies the abuse and believes that it is either Destiny or her boyfriend.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Police informed Latoya that her husband was accused of molesting her daughter. She immediately kicked him out, but feels torn. Then, Jesenia suspects her ex Melvin molested their daughter, but Melvin maintains his innocence!

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating; Jim denies having sex with his fiancee's sister and underage girls.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Laharla caught her mother's boyfriend Victor cheating when she saw him through their window. Then, Aaron claims that a woman named Olivia will not leave him alone after they met in person.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: A look at guests who are subjected to emotional abuse that chips away at their self-worth and independence.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Adrian thinks Shantay has been lying throughout their relationship; Uniqua and her husband fear that he is not the father of her child; Chris' girlfriend wants him to know that one of their five children is not his.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Alfred thinks his partner is living a secret life; Demetrius says his wife is having an affair and gave him an STD; Latavia's ex-boyfriend takes a lie-detector test to try to win her back.

programme.title: The Killing Secret
programme.desc: The outside looking in, Daniel and his wife Brenda appeared to have it all together, but smiles can be deceiving, and kisses can be poison. A healthy marriage is difficult to attain and destroy, but not when secrets are intertwined in the vows, especially one that can kill.

programme.title: The Perfect Wife
programme.desc: A young freelance photographer in Houston meets a beautiful determined teacher from Atlanta. His best friend tries to warn him about her. There is something a little strange about Claudia. Q loves her dearly but she may not be The Perfect Wife.

programme.title: The Perfect Wife 2
programme.desc: The Styles Girls relocate to a new state to start over after the loss of the only place they knew. Unbeknownst to them, the secrets they left behind surface within the walls of their new residence.

programme.title: The Exit Row
programme.desc: Sasha Dade is dedicated to her demanding, yet comfortable life as a wife, mother and advertising executive near the nation's capital. Clint Meyers is a top selling real estate agent and investor who projects sensitivity and charisma but harbors a methodical dark side. Their worlds collide when a chance encounter on a traumatic flight leads to a deadly obsession.

programme.title: The Break of Dawn
programme.desc: After leaving an abusive relationship, college student Dawn Monae discovers that her ex has committed suicide. After some time, she meets a man named Keith online, but her roommates suspect that he isn’t who he says he is. Little do they know, he has an agenda that no one saw coming.

programme.title: The Betrayal 5: Kutthroat Fa Eva
programme.desc: Love, power, and revenge fuel the war between two rival gangs. As blood spills and alliances crumble, a forbidden romance continues to spark in the chaos. But the streets are buzzing with questions about the updates with TK! Is it all part of the plan, or the beginning of the end?

programme.title: Rhythm and Revenge
programme.desc: After losing her parents, Journi, a talented but troubled teenager, moves in with her aunt and cousin for a fresh start. As she navigates the pressures of competitive dance, strange accidents begin to occur around her. Suspicion grows, but Journi always seems one step ahead, charming her way out of trouble. However, when the truth starts to unravel, danger lurks closer than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Demon Time
programme.desc: William is going through a tumultuous time in his life following the death of his father, and the break up of his girlfriend. As he begins to put his life back together, he discovers his father left behind a substantial debt that could cost him his life. William must face is past, and discover not only his truth, but his father’s as well.

programme.title: The Lineup
programme.desc: Sebastian “Bas” Monte is an up-and-coming influencer and club promoter. He doesn’t have the time to commit to only one woman, so he schedules out different women for his needs. That is until he meets Mikayla, and he questions his playboy ways.

programme.title: The New Girl
programme.desc: When her sister Monica suddenly disappears under suspicious circumstances, Malorie becomes convinced that Monica’s seemingly perfect husband is hiding something sinister. She then launches her own investigation and unearths a twisted web of lies, abuse, and even political conspiracy. Malorie must confront dangerous secrets that not only threaten her sister’s life but her own.

programme.title: Rage: Kill or Be Killed
programme.desc: Jackie “Labrae” Robinson dominates Houston’s unsanctioned boxing circuit—until he comes face-to-face with the one opponent, he never imagined fighting: his personal hero, legendary champion Theo Barnes. However, Theo is a haunted man dealing with his own demons and an advanced case of CTE. A first meeting quickly escalates into an all-out brawl, making the stakes of two champion fighters that much higher.

programme.title: For All Have Sinned
programme.desc: After the sudden death of his mother, Mano embarks on a violent path that stems from his grief and causes him to spiral. He lives by the mantra of Romans 3:23 “for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God.” When a local church members attempts to reach him, he finds a way to navigate his pain and grief.

programme.title: Vices
programme.desc: Simone, a married woman battling anxiety and the lingering shadow of her past alcoholism, escapes to collect her thoughts. When a storm isolates her in her remote cabin, she’s hunted by two forces: the seductive pull of her past addiction, and a cunning serial killer. Surrounded by a web of lies and sin, Simone must face her inner demons before a literal one ends her life.

programme.title: He'll Still Never Let Go
programme.desc: In the wake of her abusive ex-boyfriend Karlton's disappearance, Candace seeks a fresh start. Just as she begins to open her heart to new love, Brandon, his reckless actions inadvertently expose her to danger, unaware that Karlton is silently watching. With her past closing in and her safety at risk, Candace must confront her deepest fears and fight to reclaim her freedom before Karlton's sinister plans destroy her chance at happiness.

programme.title: The Housekeeper
programme.desc: After the death of her son, Sharease Smalls loses everything, and is forced to move back in with her sister Elise. Struggling to find steady work, Sharease agrees to become a live-in housekeeper for a local crime boss, Zues. The pairs professional relationship soon turns intimate, but it’s only a veil of secrets and lies. Will Sharease survive the truth?

programme.title: Death in the Garden
programme.desc: Adventurer Shark comes to a small village near a diamond-miners' camp, and local police arrest him, accusing him of having committed a bank robbery in a neighboring town. The police also confiscate the diamond mine for the state, which incites the miners to revolt, but they're defeated. Shark, Father Lizzardi, Castin, his daughter, and Djin, a whore Castin loves, flee into the jungle and fight for their lives.

programme.title: City Lights
programme.desc: With the aid of a wealthy erratic tippler, a dewy-eyed tramp who has fallen in love with a sightless flower girl accumulates money to be able to help her medically.

programme.title: Tears in the Rain
programme.desc: Casey Cantrell is on her way to London to deliver her mother's deathbed letter to Lord Bredon. She finds herself being pursued by two wealthy men, who delve deep into her past and come up with a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: El nombre de esta Denominación de Origen de Portugal quiere decir literalmente Vino Verde, por que sus uvas eran tradicionalmente vendimiadas verdes, para evitar los riesgos de la podredumbre.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Si duda alguna el vino más prestigioso de Portugal es el Oporto, su nombre deriva de Porto, que en portugués quiere decir Puerto, o mejor dicho El Puerto en donde los vinos son envejecidos y desde donde eran desde antiguo embarcados a todos los rincones del Mundo.

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Saint Emilion es la capital de la Margen Derecha, aquí la historia del vino se remonta a los romanos, que extraían piedras para construir en galerías subterráneas que además irían a propiciar las condiciones ideales de envejecimiento de los vinos

programme.title: Wineman
programme.desc: Es difícil recorrer una isla de tantas formas como lo hemos hecho: en todo terreno, a pie, en camello, en drones y hasta debajo del agua.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We're in Groenlo, east of Holland With the new Talent from South Africa and 2025 Strongest Man of the World - Rayno Nel. The first 3 events are Truckpull, Log Lift and Loading race. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it is the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the land of Vikings - Norway - to the first stage of the SCL World Series 2016

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The second stage of the SCL heads to the FIBO convention, Cologne. The leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health hosts.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: For the third stage of SCL world series 2016, the athletes compete in Kaunas for the SCL Log Lift World Championships.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage four is an epic competition and a few surprises. With 14 strongmen from all over the world, one newcomer left quite an impression.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year's injury in Romania

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The SCL train stopped in Zlatibor for the stage 6 of the MLO SCL. 11 compete for the title in the home country of legendary Ervin Katona.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Bulgaria hosts the next stage of the SCL. Current leader in the World Series is Matjaz Belsak, youngest competitor and strongest man of Slovenia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The competitors battle it out in the special event, the Atlas Steel Stone. This stone is made completely from iron and cannot be touched with any support.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This stage sees the strongmen visit Vaasa, Finland. Residents here are familiar with the competition because some of the SCL icons are from their country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: 38 athletes compete in the under 90kg and under 105kg SCL World Championships. From each weight class, the top 12 qualify for the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: A two day, seven event battle with lots of spectators.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Alex Moonen is leading. Part two of the competition in Romania showcases a new challenge - Hercules Hold.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this stage in Curacao no one wants to lose the chance to fight for one kilo gold in World grand finals in Dubai.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The last chance to qualify for the World Grand Finale. Zageris and Belsak fight for the better position for the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We reach Dubai where we will crown the new champion for SCL 2016. This is part one of the world finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this last episode, the best athletes compete in Pole Push, Deadlift, Forward Hold and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in beautiful Norway for the kick off of the 2017 MLO Strongman Champions League season. With partly cloudy weather and lots of snow, we have the perfect scenery for the athletes, who prepare for the first contest of the year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: A definite highlight in this FIBO edition in Germany, Strongman Champions League introduced its new rules for a special team item. Graham Hicks tries here to set a New World Record on the biggest log in the world, currently held by Krzysztof Radzikowski. Boosted also by the presence of the acclaimed in the strongman circles names of Mark Felix and Danis Zageris.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight’. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World’s Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Sheri Courter and Christine Karges take on Sarah Mitten and Mary Helen Atkins in this Women's Senior Pro Quarterfinal Match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Mixed Pro split age - Simone Jardim & Jaime Oncins competing with Susannah Barr & Dave Weinbach in the second Semifinal match.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: October 10, 2023 - Welcome to week 3 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Tempe Tornadoes face-off against the Surprise Stingers.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Naples JBB United face off against the Boca Raton Picklers in a women's match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: In this high-stakes Bronze Medal match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, veteran competitors Jenny Klitch and Sheri Courter go head-to-head with Ellen Novoseletsky and Jenny Marcos. Expect calculated teamwork, steady hands, and sharp strategy as these seasoned senior pros compete for a podium finish. Filmed live from Naples, Florida, this match showcases the competitive spirit and skill that define senior pro pickleball.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The stakes reach their absolute peak at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for the first semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2, where there are "no do overs" for the Chennai Super Champs and Pune United. Witness a high-stakes tactical chess match as Chennai’s coach Jonny Goldberg makes the bold move to start premier player Rika Fujiwara against the "big and aggressive" Katie Morris in a critical women's singles clash. The intensity continues with a masterclass in mixed doubles featuring the powerful pairing of Lee Hwang Nam and Carlota Trevino facing off against Pune's consistent stars, William Sobeck and Magdalena Gregorio. Every point is a desperate grind for survival as these two titans battle through "world class" rallies for a guaranteed spot in the grand finale.

programme.title: The Wager
programme.desc: Set at the scenic Troubadour Golf and Field Club in Nashville, TN, this exhibition match brings a mix of celebrity flair and friendly competition to the pickleball court. Olympian Shawn Johnson and her husband Andrew East take on TV host Jason Kennedy and pro Wes Burrows in a lighthearted yet tightly contested match that goes down to the wire. With Shawn still learning the ropes (and the rules), and Andrew channeling his athletic instincts, the duo puts up an impressive fight against the more experienced Kennedy and Burrows. It’s a fast-paced, fun-filled match full of laughs, learning moments, and great rallies—perfect for fans of lifestyle sports and celebrity matchups.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Live from the NCPA Indiana Regional 2025, watch a thrilling collegiate pickleball battle between Purdue University and Creighton University. Tied at 2-2 entering the broadcast, this match features intense mixed doubles action that decides the series.Key matchups include Purdue’s Emma Jones and Jay Barath facing off against Creighton’s Russell Lee and Lucy. Later, Purdue’s Caleb Young and Tammy Lamb take on Creighton’s Noah Wodzinski and Elizabeth Cook.

programme.title: Pickleball England
programme.desc: Live from Bolton Arena in Greater Manchester, this Group A match at the English Nationals 2023 features Daniel Wren and Alex Woolf squaring off against Sebastien Malbois and Roberto Rospo. The teams bring a mix of controlled setups, powerful drives, and smart resets as they battle for an early advantage in the tournament.Expect sharp exchanges at the kitchen, tactical stacking, and impressive shot-making as both sides fight for momentum in this fast-paced men’s doubles opener.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Molly Carter and Kim Kesner take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Backdraw Semifinal.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal match between Paul Olin and Rick Witsken.

programme.title: The Wager
programme.desc: Jason Kennedy and Wes Burrows challenge Golden Tate and Eric Decker.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Naples JBB United face off against the Indianapolis Drivers in a mixed NPL team match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: NCPA Championship: Utah Valley vs Utah Tech in the 2025 NCPA Championships from Las Vegas.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: This Pro Women's Doubles match at the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships features the dynamic team of Anna Leigh Waters and Lee Waters facing off against the formidable duo of Walczak and Harris. The Waters team, known for their aggressive play and powerful shots, including Anna Leigh's unique heavy topspin cross-court backhand roll, aim to dominate the court. Walczak, a native of Poland with collegiate tennis experience, and Harris seek to overcome the Waters' early lead and challenge their expected path to the Championship court.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Indianapolis Drivers take on the Coachella Valley Scorpions in a mixed team match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Stefan Andren and Alix Truong take on Christine Karges and Eric Oncins in this Mixed Pro Split Age Backdraw Semifinal match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The grand finale of the World Pickleball League Season 2 descends upon Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for an unforgettable clash of titans between the Chennai Super Champs and Delhi Dilwale. Witness the technical mastery of Rika Fujiwara as she faces off against Alejandra Lopez in a high-stakes women’s singles match that sets the tone for the entire championship. The intensity reaches a fever pitch during a mixed doubles "masterclass" featuring Max Mansoor and Trang Huynh, which commentators hailed as the potential "rally of the season". With the "Band of Honor" and the ultimate league trophy on the line, every strategic "Pickle Play" and nerve-wracking volley contributes to an atmosphere so electric the crowd and commentators alike are left "going berserk".

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Dave Weinbach & Mari Humberg in this Mixed Pro Split Age Semifinal match.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the high-stakes Women's Doubles Open Final featuring Team England against Team Spain. Defending champions Spain, represented by the powerhouse duo of Sabrina Mendez and Glauka Carvajal, look to secure their second consecutive title against the English pair of Thaddea Lock and Katy Morris.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023
programme.desc: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.

programme.title: Court Kings
programme.desc: Get the behind-the-scenes look of the pickleball court construction process with the Court Kings crew Lonnie "Hurricane" Anger, Alex "Mufasa" Lanzetta, Paul "Gucci" Roschfska and Jerry "Cruise" Duncan.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2018
programme.desc: April 22, 2018 - April 28, 2018 at the East Naples Community Park in Naples, Florida

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Parris Todd and Simone Jardim compete with Bobbi Oshiro and Megan Fudge for gold in this Gold Medal Match.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Oklahoma City Punishers in a men's match from June 2024.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: Get ready for a great singles match as Simone Jardim takes on Kristen Kopp at the Usopp National Pickleball Center. This venue, home to the Usopp Pickleball Academy, is a hub for lessons and training, making it an amazing facility for all things pickleball.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Step into the electric Jio World Garden in Mumbai for a high-stakes showdown where the road to the playoffs is on the line. Delhi Dilwale enter this tie in second place, looking to solidify their dominance and secure a "Q" next to their name for a guaranteed spot in the semifinals. On the other side, Pune United are fighting for survival, desperately needing a win after finally breaking their season-long drought earlier in the day. Witness intense matchups as tactical veterans like Trang Huynh and Max Mansoor face off against Pune's resilient stars, including the grit of Katie Morris and the power of William Sobeck. In a league where every rally counts toward the "Band of Honor," these athletes must battle both their opponents and the relentless 15-minute clock in a masterclass of professional pickleball.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Joshua demands the return of an engagement ring after Eldrick ends their relationship in a viral livestream.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.

programme.title: Cutler's Court
programme.desc: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.

programme.title: Cutler's Court

programme.title: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Nicola Bellizzi returns to Naples, after spending six years in a juvenile detention centre, determined to get out of his outcast status and become a lawyer. In the neighbourhood, Gaetano, known as Core e' Fierro, is the absolute boss of the guapperia. A clash takes place between the two young men; but the behaviour of Nicola, who defends Gaetano from the commissioner Ajossa who has caught them duelling, gives rise to a deep friendship between the two. After many denials, driven by necessity, Nicola agrees to become a guappo in turn during an initiation at the secret court to which he is introduced by Core e' Fierro. Lucia, Gaetano's woman, feels attracted to Nicola, but the two repress their desire. Ajossa wants to get his hands on Gaetano and sets a trap for Lucia, inducing her to yield to him in order to save her lover, so that the latter, in order to avenge the offence, will make a mistake.
